steps.name: source-body-connector-selection-and-policy-gate
steps.summary: ESB1 added scripts/external_source_connector_body_selection.py, tests/test_external_source_connector_body_selection.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-esb1-source-body-connector-selection.md. It selects interpretive_accounting_material as the first connector lane, keeps live fetching/chunking/embedding blocked, and limits public reports to metadata/policy/schema/status fields.
